cases.note: matches 'could not find remote ref'; input is the error message string (TS does String(error), so a raw string is identical to new Error(message))
cases.input: fatal: could not find remote ref refs/heads/feature/test

cases.note: matches the contraction "couldn't find remote ref"
cases.input: fatal: couldn't find remote ref refs/heads/feature/test

cases.note: auth failure is not a missing-remote-ref error
network failure is not a missing-remote-ref error
cases.input: fatal: unable to access repo: Could not resolve host

cases.note: edge: match is case-insensitive (message is lowercased before comparison)
cases.input: FATAL: COULD NOT FIND REMOTE REF refs/heads/x

cases.note: edge: empty message matches neither phrase
